---
title: "readme"
output: html_document
---

# What's in this folder?

This folder includes all the scripts (most in Quarto Documents) and outputs, both model and graphs, that were used during the exploration part of this project.

The DAGcode.qmd contains the code for the directed acyclic graph that was used while thinking about our project.

The Exploratory_Behavior_code.qmd contains the code for the exploratory models and graphs we ran while thinking about our data.

Model.distributions.testing.qmd is code that was used to look at different brms distribution families for our data.
